message:
refactor(abi): migrate signal/pidfd/timer functions to native syscalls

Adds 8 new syscall wrappers:
- sys_signalfd4, sys_pidfd_open, sys_pidfd_send_signal
- sys_timer_create, sys_timer_settime, sys_timer_gettime
- sys_timer_getoverrun, sys_timer_delete

Migrates 9 libc::syscall calls to native wrappers (191 → 182).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
